output.code: import json, re, os, unicodedata, itertools, math, statistics, difflib, sys, textwrap, pprint, numpy as np

# Load the provided files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadith) if isinstance(hadith, list) else type(hadith)

# Define normalization helpers
import re
AR_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, "")
    s = AR_DIACRITICS.sub("", s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا")
    s = s.replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ة", "ه")
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]", " ", s)
    # lowercase (no effect)
    s = s.lower()
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def token_set(s):
    return set(normalize_ar(s).split())

def lcs_len(a, b):
    # LCS length dynamic programming
    na, nb = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(nb+1)
    for i in range(1, na+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, nb+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[nb]

def sim_score(s1, s2):
    # normalized LCS on normalized strings
    n1 = normalize_ar(s1)
    n2 = normalize_ar(s2)
    if not n1 or not n2:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_len(n1, n2)
    return lcs / max(len(n1), len(n2))

def token_f1(s1, s2):
    t1 = token_set(s1)
    t2 = token_set(s2)
    if not t1 or not t2:
        return 0.0
    inter = len(t1 & t2)
    prec = inter / len(t1)
    rec = inter / len(t2)
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

target_full = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
target_snippet = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"  # we will ignore ellipses

def search_in_quran(target, topk=10):
    results = []
    for v in quran:
        text = v.get("ayah_text", "")
        score = sim_score(target, text)
        f1 = token_f1(target, text)
        if "الشكر" in normalize_ar(text) or "فعل" in normalize_ar(text) or "عدد" in normalize_ar(text) or score>0.2:
            results.append((score, f1, text, v))
    results.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
    return results[:topk]

def search_in_hadith(target, topk=10):
    results = []
    for h in hadith:
        text = h.get("hadithTxt") or h.get("Matn") or ""
        if not text:
            continue
        score = sim_score(target, text)
        f1 = token_f1(target, text)
        # check tokens to limit
        if "الشكر" in normalize_ar(text) or "فعل" in normalize_ar(text) or "عدد" in normalize_ar(text) or score>0.2:
            results.append((score, f1, text, h))
    results.sort(key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
    return results[:topk]

q_results = search_in_quran(target_full, 20)
h_results = search_in_hadith(target_full, 20)
len(q_results), len(h_results), q_results[:3]

    n = normalize_ar(v["ayah_text"])
    if any(p in n for p in patterns):
        cands.append((v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text'], n))

# Search hadith for the exact phrase "فعل الشكر" or patterns
def search_hadith_phrase(phrase):
    res=[]
    np = normalize_ar(phrase)
    for h in hadith:
        text = h.get("hadithTxt") or h.get("Matn") or ""
        n = normalize_ar(text)
        if np in n:
            res.append(text)
    return res

search_hadith_phrase("فعل الشكر")[:5], search_hadith_phrase("وعدد لكم")[:5]
